title: NASA Space Apps Challenge — Top 5 in India
description: Placed in the top 5 nationwide out of 823 competing teams for ORBITAIR, an AI-powered geospatial AQI forecasting engine.

title: Smart India Hackathon — National Participant
description: Selected to represent Dr. Akhilesh Das Gupta IPS at the national finals for SAHAI, a mental health & lifestyle platform.

title: Smart Delhi Ideathon — Top 5 & Civic Prize
description: Awarded ₹7,000 and ranked in the top 5 for developing civic tech solutions resolving local municipal challenges.
